modules.sql: WITH account_type_counts AS (SELECT COALESCE(account_type, '') AS account_type, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM accounts GROUP BY COALESCE(account_type, '')), last_seen_type AS (SELECT a.account_id, COALESCE(a.account_type, '') AS account_type FROM accounts a INNER JOIN (SELECT account_id, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS max_ifw_effective_date FROM accounts GROUP BY account_id) latest ON a.account_id = latest.account_id AND a.ifw_effective_date = latest.max_ifw_effective_date), overdraft_type_counts AS (SELECT lst.account_type, COUNT(*) AS overdraft_count FROM overdraft_events oe INNER JOIN last_seen_type lst ON oe.account_id = lst.account_id GROUP BY lst.account_type), first_ifw_effective_date AS (SELECT MIN(ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM overdraft_events) SELECT atc.account_type, atc.account_count, COALESCE(otc.overdraft_count, 0) AS overdraft_count, COALESCE(otc.overdraft_count, 0) / atc.account_count AS overdraft_rate, fa.ifw_effective_date FROM account_type_counts atc LEFT JOIN overdraft_type_counts otc ON atc.account_type = otc.account_type CROSS JOIN first_ifw_effective_date fa
